expectations.evidence: No empty catch blocks. No console.log-only catches. Every error path returns a typed Result with error details.
Full Result<T,E> type with discriminated SyncError union: FETCH_USER_FAILED, FETCH_PREFERENCES_FAILED, UPSERT_USER_FAILED, UPSERT_PREFERENCES_FAILED.
Original error preserved as `cause` in all error types. Upsert uses `new Error('...', { cause: { updateCause, insertCause } })`.
`signal: AbortSignal.timeout(FETCH_TIMEOUT_MS)` on fetch calls with FETCH_TIMEOUT_MS = 5000.
